reviews.review_title: Gravi is fire!🔥Devs Cooked on Moshpit!
reviews.review_description:
🚀Gravi combines the chaos of zero-gravity with creative fun. This game is fun!
Hop into topsy turvy game lobbies with friends, make new friends, have fun hanging out using innovative gadgets or compete in gravity defying Parkour Speedrun challenges, try to avoid the Infection, or jump into the Infamous Moshpit! 

 🧑‍🚀💣🧑‍🚀🪦Moshpit!  I'm no good at it, but I Love It!
Crazy PvE battles for Ultimate bragging rights.  Can you Survive?  Can you Win?  Do you have what it takes to go Bot vs Bot and claim your spot on the Leaderboard?  Moshpit is fun, fast & furious, the rounds are really quick and action packed!  Don't look away or you'll end up back in the control room wondering what happened.  

Like all free games, Gravi has it's own in-game currency, Nano Credits, that're used to buy cool cosmetics and an array of gadgets.  The game provides plenty of opportunity to get free NCs with daily challenges, weekly leaderboard events, friend referrals and special promo codes.  If you really want to support the game, get the Bundle!

There’s a really sigma astronaut bundle that you should totally buy and you can even hit your friends around with baseball bats, and you could use the freeze bomb. My favorite item is definitely the bat. If you put the bats next to each other and you hit a person they go like flying. You should download gravity and play it for yourself. Have a great day.

The idea is great, and therefore the game is pretty great, but there’s quite a big problem that nobody knows what to do. I’ve been in lobbies with 10 people saying “How do I do XYZ” because there’s no tutorial and no way to figure out anything. Every day it seems there’s a new bug too.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the honest feedback! 💬 You're totally right—we know it can be confusing at first, and that’s why we’re working on a tutorial to help new players out. We’re also fixing bugs super actively, so every update brings improvements. Big thanks for sticking with us, hope we can earn that 5th star from you soon!

I had gravi since the start of the alpha testing and ohh!, it was a blast I got to play Tag with so many people and got to fight for the throne in the moshpit all to say is that the game is so fun and really made for people with energy and ADHD go download the game now!!, to join me in the next BEST game on VR, GRAVI

If you want to experience a space themed, action packed social game with a vibrant and friendly community, then Gravi is for you. Play tag, battle it out with your friends in the Mosh Pit, compete for top position on the leaderboard, mine Nexium for in game currency and have an amazing VR experience. Gravi promises to have lots of giveaways, have constant updates with even more amazing maps and game modes to explore. The uniqueness of Gravi is the many micro gravity environments in all the maps where the players get to experience something amazing. Download Gravi now. You won't be disappointed. Also join the Gravi discord to unlock even more roles, perks and giveaways.

It's truly remarkable how the experience of Gravi vr can be so engaging. The sensation of weightlessness, combined with the freedom to explore, is incredibly captivating. Navigating through the diverse environments using the provided mechanics is a unique and delightful experience. Furthermore, the puzzle-solving elements add a layer of intellectual stimulation that enhances the overall enjoyment. Ultimately, Gravi vr provides a memorable and enjoyable journey.

reviews.review_title: I love it, but a few issues.
reviews.review_description: I mean it's literally yeeps in space, and gravi has done pretty well, it's a bit bad for new players but becomes a blast when you figure it out. Fun with friends or without although a bit grindy at points but I understand that it's still in development and I'm hoping the devs keep improving! <3

developer_response.body:
We are so glad to hear that you like having fun as soon as everything clicks. We're constantly working to improve Gravi. We are hoping to achieve that sparkly 5-star in the next update! 💫

Thanks for sticking with us—Gravi on! 🚀✨

developer_response.body:
Hey PeaShooter1223! 👋
Thanks so much for the awesome review! We're really glad you're having fun and meeting nice players 💛 That "return to floor" idea is super helpful—we totally get how frustrating that can be, and we’re looking into ways to fix it soon. 🚀

Thanks for sticking with us while we improve Gravi. Maybe one day we’ll earn that 5th star from you? 😄
Gravi on! 🌌

reviews.review_description: When playing Moshpit, everyone is super nice and are good sports about everything. Everyone in there also makes some of the funniest clips on VR. The community is amazing and very kind. Out of the few VR games that I play, Gravi is up in my top 3 list.

Gravi is super fun, it has 2 game modes, but I’m going to focus on 🔥moshpit💥. It is my favorite, it is definitely the most active mode, it is a competitive PVP arena that is last man standing wins, you push others off with the hyper punch gadget!👊 The community is super nice.😊Yea, sure a lot of them are new because the game released not too long a go. reviews.review_title: Gravi is top 5 apps right now🔥
reviews.review_description:
This game is like if yeeps and Orion drift had a baby and it’s fire🔥. The gadgets are really cool and u can join codes so u can play with your friends. The cosmetics look really cool and most of them are really cheap. U start off with 500 of the money so u can unlock the picaxe really fast. They cooked on the mosh pit it’s one of my favorite maps to go in and play around. And if u go into the station it’s really 

fun and silly to do flips with the mechanics. That’s all and again gravi is top 5 app right now🙂

reviews.review_title: This is an awesome game❤️! GO DOWNLOAD🔥
reviews.review_description: This game has so many cool mechanics to use. Though Ido get motion sickness in reality so sometimes get dizzy. But that has nothing to do with the games production that’s just me. This game easily slipping into my top 5 best games in my opinion. When you first start Gravi you can explore so many different places and each of them will make you have so much fun every second. Round of applause for the developers👏👏👏.

reviews.review_title: Game is so fun to play!
reviews.review_description: I had a very fun time playing. I would definitely recommend this game to anybody.
Honestly pretty high quality and very fun! If you got some time to kill and wanna have fun, gravi is your game!

This Game Is A Mix Of Yeeps, Animal Company, Orion Drift, And Gtag. However This Game Gets Pretty Boring After A Week Of Playing, Only Because The Game Lacks Content, I Unlocked The Best Item In The Game In 7 Days, And There Is Only 3 Gamemodes, TAG (meltdown) And PvP (moshpit) And A Hangout Mode (the main lobby). But Overall It's A Solid Game, And The Game Has Only Been Out For A Month... So It Makes Since It's Lacking Content!

After about 20 minutes I ran out of things to do. To add on to this the player model, gadget system, and some of the cosmetics are extremely similar to Yeeps. Besides this the gravity physics and developer interactions are great and the game is in EA and I can’t wait to see what’s coming next!

developer_response.body:
Hey YourAverageToast! Thanks a ton for giving Gravi a try and sharing your thoughts. We're still in early access and hear you on the content side — more depth and variety are exactly what we're working on next. As for the similarities to Yeeps, we totally get the comparison — we love that game too, and we’re pushing hard to carve out our own identity with some big updates on the way.

We hope to win you back and possibly earn a higher rating in the future! <3
